positive: A stylized, geometric composition featuring a majestic, soaring eagle in mid-flight, depicted with sharp, clean lines and a powerful silhouette. The eagle is surrounded by abstract, crystalline mountain peaks and flowing, minimalist clouds. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, slate gray, and brilliant gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Deco and modern graphic illustration, ensuring the design is highly contrasting, centered, and visually impactful for clothing prints. The composition must maintain strong negative space around the main subject and secondary elements for print visibility. High contrast, vector-like quality, symmetrical balance.
negative: blurry, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, noisy, noise, poor composition, soft focus, writing, jpeg artifacts
